description: A genetically-calibrated, AI-powered life-optimization engine inspired by Solo Leveling. Gamifies daily productivity through quests, XP, leveling, shadow armies, dungeons, and real-time market intelligence.
theme: Solo Leveling × Jarvis — dark cyberpunk UI with holographic cyan/purple accents

techStack.styling: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + custom design tokens
techStack.stateManagement: React Context + localStorage + Supabase (via Lovable Cloud)

ai.pattern: Dual-model pipeline — Groq for fast tactical scans, Gemini for deep strategic synthesis

authentication.sessionManagement: AuthContext with onAuthStateChange listener, auto-refresh tokens, clearSystemStorage on sign-out

player_state.purpose: Core player progression — level, XP, stats, streak, penalty state
player_state.rls: Users can only CRUD their own row
player_state.autoCreated: Yes — via handle_new_user() trigger on auth.users insert

profiles.purpose: User display info — name, title, goal
profiles.rls: Users can only CRUD their own row

quest_history.purpose: Append-only log of all completed quests (daily + main)
quest_history.rls: Users can INSERT and SELECT only their own rows (no UPDATE/DELETE)

shadow_army.purpose: Compounding assets — automations, skills, tools, frameworks, protocols

dungeons.purpose: Time-limited challenges — boss fights, instant dungeons, S-rank gates

inventory.purpose: Player inventory — automations count, cash reserves, clients, skills, templates
inventory.rls: INSERT, SELECT, UPDATE for own row

system_notifications.purpose: In-app notification log — level ups, streak milestones, shadow extractions, dungeon clears

chat_messages.rls: SELECT, INSERT, DELETE for own rows

functions.handle_new_user(): Trigger on auth.users INSERT — auto-creates profile, player_state, and inventory rows
functions.has_role(): Security definer function to check user roles without recursive RLS

system-chat.purpose: Conversational AI interface — streaming chat with full player context injection
system-chat.model: Gemini 3 Flash Preview (via Lovable AI Gateway)
features: Streaming SSE responses
Player state injection (level, stats, streak, goal, shadows, dungeons)
Real-time market intelligence injection via Groq pre-fetch
Solo Leveling + Jarvis voice personality
2026 market-aware responses

system-intelligence.purpose: Daily AI-generated strategic analysis — briefs, trajectory forecasts, challenges, shadow/dungeon recommendations
features: Daily strategic brief generation
Trajectory forecasting (current vs optimized vs ceiling)
Dynamic challenge generation (B/A/S rank, calibrated to player edge)
Shadow army recommendations (unrestricted categories — cognitive, physical, neurological, etc.)
Dungeon recommendations (calibrated to weakest stats)
Real-time 2026 market intelligence via Groq pre-fetch
Genetic profile awareness (COMT Val/Val, ACTN3 CC)

shadow-activate.purpose: AI-powered shadow activation — generates actionable content when a shadow is activated

modes.scout: Deep reconnaissance — intelligence gathering with Groq tactical pre-scan + Gemini synthesis. Returns structured recon reports with key findings, tool stacks, and threat assessments.
modes.standard: Content generation — templates, protocols, frameworks, exercises. Scaled by shadow power level (1-10).

features: Auto-evolution: shadows gain power and contribution score on each activation
Scout shadows get Groq live intel feed injected into Gemini prompt
Power level scaling (1-10) affects content depth and sophistication
Activation count tracking via metadata

web-intel.purpose: Dual-model intelligence gathering engine for market research

modes.brief: Fast Groq market pulse for daily briefs
modes.scan: Groq tactical scan of specific topics
modes.scout: Dual-model recon — Gemini deep + Groq cross-validation

/.name: Dashboard (Index)
/.description: Main dashboard — System Intelligence panel, Shadow Army, Dungeons, Progress Ring, Today's Snapshot, Quick Actions, System Chat
components: TopBar (system mode indicator, notifications, force refresh)
SystemIntelligencePanel (strategic analysis, trajectory, challenges, shadow/dungeon suggestions)

/quests.name: Quests
/quests.description: Quest execution — calibrated quests organized by time block, protocol quests, pillar quests, shadow quests, sprint timer
features: AI-calibrated quests based on state scan (energy, sleep, stress, mood)
Time block organization (morning, midday, afternoon, evening)
Difficulty badges (E/D/C/B/A/S rank)
Persuasion engine — dynamic motivational framing per quest
Sprint timer (45-min sprints with breaks, genetic-calibrated)
Shadow quests (hidden bonus quests that appear based on completions)
Pillar quests (Mind, Body, Skill — daily non-negotiables)
Pre-commitment system (evening commitment for next day)
Loot drops on quest completion
Weekly planning for sprint days (Thu-Sat)

/training.name: Training
/training.description: Workout module — genetically-calibrated exercise tracking with progressive overload
features: Weekly workout schedule (push/pull/legs/power/peloton/animal-flow/rest)
Exercise checklist with progressive overload hints
Genetic HUD (COMT phase, energy state, sprint count)
Training prescription (intensity level based on readiness score)
Workout swap system (auto-adjusts based on muscle recovery)
Post-workout buff system (stat bonuses after training)

/progress.name: Progress
/progress.description: Progress tracking — milestones, stats radar, quest history, resistance analysis, predictions, weekly summary
sections: Milestones (main quests — long-term goals with XP rewards)
Quest Log (history of completed quests by day)
Weekly Summary (XP, quests, active days this week)

/more.name: More
/more.description: Menu hub — genetic profile, inventory, supplements, settings, about
subViews: Genetic Profile (COMT/ACTN3/CYP1A2 traits — buffs and debuffs)
Inventory (automations, cash reserves, clients, skills, templates)

/settings.name: Settings
/settings.description: Configuration — AI quest engine API keys, auto-deploy toggle, start date, replay awakening, clear data, sign out
features: Groq + Gemini API key management (for AI quest generation)
AI quest generation toggle + manual trigger
Auto-deploy toggle (System Intelligence auto-creates shadows/dungeons)
Start date configuration
Replay Awakening Sequence
Clear All Data
Sign Out

/system-analytics.name: System Analytics
features: Technique effectiveness chart (12 persuasion techniques with completion rates)
Psychological profile radar (loss aversion, competitive, identity, commitment, novelty, streak)
Technique rotation log (last 20 events)
Habituation monitor (technique fatigue tracking)
Pre-commitment stats (accept rate, follow-through, broken commitments)
Shadow quest stats (spawned, completed, completion rate, difficulty modifier)
Weekly insight (AI-generated weekly performance analysis)

/reset-password.name: Reset Password
/reset-password.description: Password reset flow after email link

AuthContext.purpose: Authentication state — user, session, loading, signOut (with storage cleanup)

HistoryContext.purpose: Quest completion history — addCompletion, daysSummary, weeklySummary (synced to Supabase)

DayCycleContext.purpose: Day transition detection — triggers daily resets at midnight PST

SystemCommsContext.purpose: System communication banners — queued messages with priority levels

core.usePlayer: Player state management — level, XP, stats, streak, penalty, goal. Persisted to localStorage + synced to Supabase via usePlayerSync
core.usePlayerSync: Bidirectional sync of player_state between localStorage and Supabase
core.useProtocolQuests: Daily protocol quests — time-blocked, genetic-calibrated, auto-resetting at midnight
core.useHistory: Quest completion history with Supabase sync via useHistorySync
core.useHistorySync: Loads quest_history from DB on login, writes completions immediately
core.useInventory: Inventory management (automations, cash, clients, skills, templates)
core.useInventorySync: Bidirectional sync of inventory data with Supabase
core.useDailyXP: Calculates total XP earned today from all sources

ai.useSystemChat: Conversational AI — streaming chat with Gemini, player context injection, chat persistence to DB
ai.useSystemIntelligenceAI: Daily System Intelligence generation — calls system-intelligence edge function
ai.useSystemStrategy: Derived strategy state — daily brief, predictions, shadow monarch progress

gamification.useShadowArmy: Shadow army CRUD — add, remove, activate shadows (backed by Supabase)
gamification.useShadowQuest: Hidden shadow quest system — quests that appear after consecutive completions
gamification.useDungeons: Dungeon CRUD — create, start, complete dungeons (backed by Supabase)
gamification.usePenaltyDungeon: Penalty dungeon system — triggers after 2+ zero-completion days
gamification.useSkills: Skill unlock system — 8 skills with various unlock conditions (streak, stats, quest count, etc.)
gamification.useLootDrops: Random loot drop system — items drop on quest completion
gamification.usePillarQuests: Daily pillar quests (Mind, Body, Skill) — non-negotiable daily minimums
gamification.usePillarStreak: Pillar completion streak tracking with shield system

behavioral.usePersuasion: Persuasion engine — selects optimal motivational technique per quest based on player psychological profile
behavioral.usePreCommitment: Evening pre-commitment system — commit to tomorrow's hardest quest
behavioral.useFocusMode: Focus mode — presents quests one at a time for deep focus execution
behavioral.useSystemComms: System communication banners — contextual messages based on state

biometric.useGeneticState: Genetic HUD state — COMT phase detection, energy tracking, sprint counting
biometric.useCaffeine: Caffeine logging — tracks intake timing relative to CYP1A2 slow metabolism
biometric.useWorkout: Workout tracking — exercises, completion, progressive overload, muscle recovery

utility.useWeeklyPlanning: Weekly sprint planning (Thu-Sat) with auto-priority and time allocation
utility.useLocalDataMigration: One-time migration of localStorage data to Supabase on first login

utils.geneticEngine: COMT Val/Val phase detection (warrior peak 8-12, crash 14-17), ACTN3 sprint optimization
utils.questCalibration: Dynamic quest difficulty calibration based on state scans, completion history, and resistance data
utils.persuasionEngine: 12-technique persuasion system with effectiveness tracking, habituation monitoring, and technique rotation
utils.persuasionOptimizer: Meta-optimization layer for the persuasion engine
utils.resistanceTracker: Behavioral resistance detection — identifies avoided quests and hard avoidance patterns
utils.systemVoice: System voice/toast message templates — Solo Leveling style clinical communication
utils.lootEngine: Random loot drop calculations with rarity tiers
utils.shadowQuests: Shadow quest generation and state management
utils.trainingIntelligence: Training recommendations based on genetic state, sprint count, and time of day
utils.trainingPrescription: Workout intensity prescription based on readiness score and genetic signals
utils.workoutSwap: Automatic workout swap when scheduled muscle group isn't recovered
utils.dayCycleEngine: PST timezone day detection and midnight countdown
utils.weeklyRhythm: Weekly rhythm detection (work days vs sprint days)
utils.aiModelRouter: Routes AI requests to appropriate model (Groq vs Gemini)
utils.revenueImpact: Revenue impact calculations for business quests

types.player: Player, PlayerStats, Rank, PenaltyState — 6 stats (sales, systems, creative, discipline, network, wealth), 8 ranks (E→Shadow Monarch)
types.questDifficulty: QuestDifficulty (E/D/C/B/A/S), badge configs with glow effects
types.skills: Skill, SkillUnlockCondition — 8 skills (Morning Dominion, Iron Will, Shadow Extraction, Dungeon Sense, Ruler's Authority, Stealth, Pillar Mastery, Dash)
types.genetics: GeneticProfile, JULIUS_GENETICS — COMT Val/Val, ACTN3 CC, CYP1A2 slow metabolism traits
types.inventory: InventoryState — automationsDeployed, cashReserves, activeClients, skillsCreated, templatesFrameworks
types.playerState: PlayerStateCheck — state scan data (energy, sleep, stress, mood, motivation)

data.dailyProtocol: Default daily protocol quest definitions with genetic bonus configs
data.pillarQuests: Pillar quest definitions (Mind: journaling, Body: movement, Skill: deliberate practice)
data.workouts: Workout configurations for each type (exercises, sets, reps, XP, color)
data.lootTable: Loot table with rarity-weighted items and stat bonuses

flow: 1. AwakeningSequence — cinematic Solo Leveling-style intro animation
2. GoalCapture — player enters their primary objective in one sentence
3. SystemBriefing — explains the System's capabilities and rules
4. First state scan auto-triggers on dashboard

xpAndLeveling.description: XP earned from quest completion, training, loot bonuses. Level-up at thresholds (500 XP increments scaling up).

shadowArmy.description: Compounding assets the player extracts and levels up. Each shadow has a power level (1-10) and contribution score. Activating shadows generates AI content (templates, protocols, recon reports). Scout shadows perform live market research.
shadowArmy.evolution: Shadows auto-evolve on activation — scouts evolve faster (0.5 power per activation vs 0.25)

dungeons.description: Challenges with objectives, time limits, and XP rewards. AI-recommended based on weakest stats.

penaltySystem.description: 2+ consecutive zero-completion days triggers mandatory Penalty Dungeon — 4hr timed quest with 3 objectives. Failure = -3 to lowest stat permanently.

streaks.completionStreak: Consecutive days completing at least 1 quest

lootSystem.description: Random drops on quest completion with rarity tiers. Cinematic reveal for rare+ items.

persuasionEngine.description: Dynamically selects the most effective motivational framing for each quest based on player psychological profile. Tracks effectiveness, detects habituation, auto-rotates techniques.

focusMode.description: Presents quests one at a time for deep focus execution. Tracks degradation level (fatigue) and skip count.

sprintTimer.description: 45-minute sprints with 10-minute breaks. Calibrated to ACTN3 CC sprinter genetics. Tracks sprints per day.

COMT_ValVal.effect: High dopamine baseline — peak cognitive performance 8-12am, crash 14-17 (2-5pm)
COMT_ValVal.systemIntegration: Morning quests get bonus XP. System warns about caffeine after 10am. Afternoon recovery mode.

ACTN3_CC.effect: Fast-twitch muscle fiber dominance — optimal in 45min explosive bursts
ACTN3_CC.systemIntegration: Sprint timer set to 45 minutes. Training prescriptions favor power/explosive work. Diminishing returns after 4 consecutive sprints.

CYP1A2_SlowMetabolizer.effect: Slow caffeine metabolism — caffeine after 10am disrupts sleep
CYP1A2_SlowMetabolizer.systemIntegration: Caffeine logging warns after 10am. Quest auto-fails if caffeine consumed late. System banners warn of debuff.

systemChat.description: Jarvis-style conversational interface. Streaming responses. Full player context injection. 2026 market intelligence grounding via Groq pre-fetch. Chat history persisted to database.
systemChat.personality: Cold, clinical, certain. Data-driven confrontation. Solo Leveling voice. Never hedges.

systemIntelligence.description: Daily AI-generated strategic analysis. Runs on dashboard load (once per day).

shadowActivation.description: AI generates actionable content when shadows are activated. Scout shadows perform live market research with dual-model intelligence.
shadowActivation.scoutMode: Groq tactical scan → injected into Gemini deep research prompt → structured recon report with key findings, tool stacks, threat assessments

webIntel.description: Standalone dual-model intelligence engine with 4 modes (brief, scan, deep, scout). Used by other systems for market grounding.

keys: systemStateHistory (state scan history — energy, sleep, stress, mood)
systemAISettings (AI engine configuration — API keys, toggles)
